Encumbered.Name: Encumbered
Encumbered.Description: Armor Rating is +6 or higher. Agility is not added to Guard checks, and Speed Bonus is limited to +2.

Afraid.Name: Afraid
Afraid.Description: An afraid character is hesitant and anxious. They cannot choose to be quick or striking when they spark on a check.

Angry.Name: Angry
Angry.Description: An angry character is rash and uncooperative. They cannot choose to be canny, quiet, or safe when they spark on a check.

Befuddled.Name: Befuddled
Befuddled.Description: A befuddled character is disoriented and confused. They cannot add any bonus to any Intellect or Spirit checks.

Clumsy.Name: Clumsy
Clumsy.Description: A clumsy character is having trouble keeping track of their belongings. They add costly as an extra shadow to all non-group checks during the dungeon frame.

Conspicuous.Name: Conspicuous
Conspicuous.Description: A conspicuous character is coughing loudly, reeks with a terrible odor, or otherwise draws attention. They add loud as an extra shadow to all non-group checks they make during the dungeon frame.

Discouraged.Name: Discouraged
Discouraged.Description: A discouraged character is expecting the worst from every endeavor. They cannot tempt fate on skill checks.

Distracted.Name: Distracted
Distracted.Description: A distracted character is lost in thought or emotion, pestered by insects, or preoccupied by something they found. They start combat with 0 focus instead of focus equal to their skill bonus.

Enfeebled.Name: Enfeebled
Enfeebled.Description: An enfeebled character is too weak to help share the load. Their inventory size is reduced by half.

Sickly.Name: Sickly
Sickly.Description: A sickly character is physically diminished and weak. They cannot add any bonus to any Might or Agility checks.

Sluggish.Name: Sluggish
Sluggish.Description: A sluggish character is dazed and unresponsive. They do not roll on initiative checks in combat, failing them automatically. They can still roll initiative to retreat as normal.

PlightPicker.Title: Select Plight
PlightPicker.SelectHint: Choose a plight to afflict this character. Active plights are disabled.
